title: About Gearframe Webtoon Studio
introduction:
Welcome to Gearframe Webtoon Studio, an all-in-one AI-powered workstation for webtoon and comic creation. This studio provides a seamless pipeline from initial idea to final panel, leveraging Google Cloud's latest generative AI models including Gemini 2.5 Flash for ultra-fast ideation and Imagen 3/4 for high-fidelity rendering.

Our mission is to empower creators by automating repetitive tasks and providing intelligent tools for creative exploration. Whether you are a professional studio or an independent artist, Gearframe Webtoon Studio is your partner in storytelling.

sections.title: Banana Studio (Nano Banana)
sections.description: The 'Nano Banana' powered studio utilizes Gemini 2.5 Flash for ultra-fast ideation. Generate dozens of concept sketches, background ideas, and character variations in sub-second speed. It acts as an AI-powered instant drafting tool for your webtoon scenes.

sections.title: Storyboard & Scripting
sections.description: Transform your rough plot into a detailed scene-by-scene script. The Storyboard tool helps you plan your layouts, camera angles, and dialogue, ensuring a solid foundation for your narrative before you start drawing.

sections.title: Cartoon & Cartoon Pro
sections.description: The flagship rendering engine for your webtoon panels. Cartoon Pro features a unique 'Red Color Instruction' recognition, allowing artists to guide the AI by adding specific notes or sketches in red over their rough layouts, maintaining artistic control over the final output.

sections.title: Character Consistency
sections.description: Maintaining character integrity is crucial for long-form storytelling. Our character consistency workflow allows you to create reference sheets and ensure that your protagonist remains visually consistent across different panels, angles, and lighting conditions.

sections.title: Integrated Asset Library
sections.description: Your central hub for all creative assets. Manage your character designs, background locations, and final panels. The Library is fully integrated with all generation tools, enabling seamless reuse of assets throughout your production pipeline.

sections.title: Modern AI Stack
sections.description: Gearframe Webtoon Studio is built using Mesop and FastAPI, optimized for rapid AI application development and seamless integration with Google Cloud's Vertex AI platform.
